DP.373.0000:
Hello!\f
Here you may cook Berries and
turn them into Poffins.\f
DP.373.0001:
Would you like to cook alone or with
other people?
DP.373.0002:
DS Wireless Communications will
be launched.
DP.373.0006: There isn’t a Berry to cook!\f
DP.373.0008:
Sorry, you must have a Poffin Case
if you want to cook some Berries.
DP.373.0013:
One person in the group needs to
choose “BECOME LEADER.”\f
Everyone else must choose
“JOIN GROUP.”
DP.373.0032:
Throw the Berry into the pot and
get stirring!\f
Watch for an arrow to show you which
direction to stir.\f
Be quick! If you stir too slowly,
you’ll burn the batter.\f
But not too quick! If you stir too fast,
the batter will overflow.\f
If you do well, you’ll cook up a
delicious Poffin!\f
You may cook alone or in a group
of up to four people.\f
With more cooks stirring, everyone will
get more Poffins!
DP.373.0033:
Please visit again whenever you get
the urge to cook!
